title: Manufacturing Engineer - UltraTech Cement - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - UltraTech Cement - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
UltraTech Cement is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!
